mapper.insert: insert into cart_items(user_id, product_id, quantity, selected) values (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{selected})
mapper.select: select id, user_id as userId, product_id as productId, quantity, selected, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from cart_items where id = #{id}
select id, user_id as userId, product_id as productId, quantity, selected, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from cart_items where user_id = #{userId} and product_id = #{productId}

select ci.id, ci.user_id as userId, ci.product_id as productId, ci.quantity, ci.selected, ci.created_at as createdAt, ci.updated_at as updatedAt, p.name as productName, p.price as productPrice, p.cover_url as productCoverUrl, p.status as productStatus from cart_items ci left join products p on ci.product_id = p.id where ci.id = #{id}

select ci.id, ci.user_id as userId, ci.product_id as productId, ci.quantity, ci.selected, ci.created_at as createdAt, ci.updated_at as updatedAt, p.name as productName, p.price as productPrice, p.cover_url as productCoverUrl, p.status as productStatus from cart_items ci left join products p on ci.product_id = p.id where ci.user_id = #{userId} order by ci.id desc

select id, user_id as userId, product_id as productId, quantity, selected, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from cart_items where id in
#{id}
